query: SELECT gameDate, source, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'hit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hits, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'miss' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as misses FROM daily_results GROUP BY gameDate, source ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wo3nqYmBAbojNN.root --database 2uhrbvmfhdghycRn5Bc5P3 --execute SELECT gameDate, source, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'hit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hits, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'miss' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as misses FROM daily_results GROUP BY gameDate, source ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 20;
